justification: All five pass criteria met: (1) Rolling deployment race condition at Step 4 identified with detailed timeline table showing mixed-instance reads, (2) Missing backfill validation before Step 4 explicitly called out with specific SQL query provided, (3) Non-resumable backfill identified as risk with checkpoint-based resumability recommended, (4) All three specific recommendations present — validation query, feature flag for atomic read-source cutover, and resumable backfill with cursor/checkpoint, (5) Verdict is NOT READY.

observations.text: Exceptionally thorough analysis — identified all three core gaps plus additional failure modes (dual-write failures, backfill race condition with ON CONFLICT resolution, rollback risks at Step 5)
The rolling deploy timeline table (T0-T3) is an excellent visualization of the consistency window problem
Provided concrete validation query: SELECT count(*) FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_preferences up ON u.id = up.user_id WHERE up.user_id IS NULL
Feature flag recommendation is specific — environment variable PREFERENCE_READ_SOURCE with atomic flip across instances via polling
Went beyond the rubric with observability gaps, operational readiness assessment, and escalation routing to other team members
Correctly identified Step 5 as the point of no return and recommended a soak period between Steps 4 and 5
Did not overcorrect — recommended specific fixes rather than halting the migration entirely
